index.title: Dalai Eej | Heritage Site & Resort at Lake Khuvsgul, Mongolia
index.description: A lakeside sanctuary dedicated to the heritage of the Blue Pearl. Experience authentic Mongolian hospitality in wood-fired cabins on the shores of Lake Khuvsgul.

story.title: Our Heritage & Story | Dalai Eej Resort
story.description: From pioneer camp beginnings to a refined heritage refuge. Discover the history and mission behind Dalai Eej on the Khuvsgul shoreline.

planner.title: Mongolia Itinerary Planner | Gobi to Khuvsgul Heritage Trail
planner.description: Plan your journey across the Great Steppe. A curated guide for travelers seeking the intersection of Mongolian history and nature.

booking.title: Book Your Stay | Dalai Eej Resort at Lake Khuvsgul
booking.description: Check availability and book your heritage cabin at Dalai Eej Resort. Wood-fired lakeside stays on the shores of Lake Khuvsgul, Mongolia.

amenities.title: Resort Amenities | Dalai Eej Heritage Site
amenities.description: Explore our lakeside amenities: private shoreline, restaurant, traditional sauna, guided tours and horse trekking at Lake Khuvsgul.

gallery.title: Visual Journey | Dalai Eej Resort Photo Gallery
gallery.description: Explore the beauty of Khuvsgul Lake, our heritage cabins, and the wilderness. A visual guide to Dalai Eej Resort.

offers.title: Special Offers & Heritage Packages | Dalai Eej Resort
offers.description: Summer 2026 exclusive offers and heritage packages at Dalai Eej Resort. Romantic escapes, family stays, and early bird deals on Lake Khuvsgul.

accommodation.title: Heritage Stays & Cabins | Dalai Eej Resort
accommodation.description: Choose from wood-fired cabins, ensuite suites, and the Grand Peninsula Suite at Dalai Eej Resort on Lake Khuvsgul.

superiorCabin.title: Superior Cabin | Dalai Eej Resort
superiorCabin.description: A wood-fired Superior Cabin on the shores of Lake Khuvsgul — designed for natural living.

cabins.title: Our Rooms | Dalai Eej Resort
cabins.description: Browse every cabin, suite, and lodge at Dalai Eej — handcrafted stays on the shores of Lake Khuvsgul.

restaurant.title: Food & Beverage | Dalai Eej Resort
restaurant.description: Three dining rooms at Dalai Eej — the open-fire Hearth, the lake-facing Sunset Deck, and the fireside Library Bar. Mongolian heritage flavors on the shores of Lake Khuvsgul.

catalogue.title: Resort Journal | Dalai Eej 2026 Archive
catalogue.description: An editorial exploration of the hearth, the sanctuary, and the spirit of Khuvsgul. Browse the 2026 resort journal.

contact.title: Contact Us | Dalai Eej Resort
contact.description: Get in touch with Dalai Eej Resort. Mergen's Ridge, Haichin Am, on the eastern shore of Lake Khuvsgul (13 km from Khatgal), Khuvsgul Province, Mongolia.

fam.title: FAM Tour Application | Dalai Eej Resort
fam.description: Tour operators and travel agencies: apply for a complimentary familiarization trip to experience Dalai Eej Resort firsthand.

hero.title: A Sanctuary on the Shoreline
hero.subtitle: Situated on the pristine shores of Lake Khuvsgul, Dalai Eej offers a refuge of comfort in the heart of the National Park.

items.yurts: Heritage Cabins & Yurts with Lake Views

dining.title: Flavors of the Steppe
dining.desc: Experience warm Mongolian hospitality. From hearty Khorkhog to fresh European favorites, our restaurant serves delicious meals prepared with local ingredients. Enjoy your morning coffee while watching the sunrise over the lake.

activities.title: Adventures on the Blue Pearl
activities.desc: The lake is your playground. Charter a motorboat to the islands, hike the surrounding larch forests, or experience the nomadic lifestyle on a guided horse trek through the valley.

relaxation.title: Disconnect to Reconnect
relaxation.desc: Far from the city lights and noise. Spend your evenings by a crackling bonfire, gazing at the Milky Way, or relaxing in our wood-fired sauna after a day of exploration.

testimonials.title: Guest Experiences
testimonials.subtitle: What our guests say
testimonials.heritage: Trusted by leaders, executives, and families since 1998.

review1.text: A peaceful, lovely stay on the quieter side of the lake. Family-run, with walking trails, a private sauna at the water's edge, and great food.
review1.author: Michael R.

review2.text: Maria was overwhelmed. Had a wonderful time with you and the family. Bless you.
review2.author: Werner & Maria

review3.text: The hospitality of the owner and staff was the most wonderful thing. I spent a quiet, peaceful time — a wonderful memory of Mongolia.
review3.author: Makoto

review4.text: Three unforgettable days with my partner. The setting beside the lake, the warmth of the owners, the quiet afternoons — easily the most memorable trip we've ever had.
review4.author: Billy P.

checkin.title: Check-In / Check-Out
checkin.desc: Check-In: 14:00 | Check-Out: 11:00. Early check-in and late check-out may be available upon request.

cancellation.title: Cancellations
cancellation.desc: Flexible cancellation up to 14 days prior to arrival. Cancellations within 14 days are subject to one night's charge.

quiet.title: Quiet Hours
quiet.desc: 23:00 - 07:00 to maintain the peace of the National Park and respect for fellow guests.

pets.title: Pet Policy
pets.desc: Pets are welcome on leashes in outdoor areas. Please inform us in advance if traveling with pets.

hero.title: Dalai Eej
hero.subtitle: A Heritage Site in the Heart of Mongolia

services.title: Resort Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need for your stay

featured_rooms.title: Heritage Accommodations
featured_rooms.subtitle: Discover our carefully curated selection of lakeside stays
featured_rooms.room1_desc: Traditional wood-fired experience with authentic furnishings
featured_rooms.room2_desc: Added comfort with stunning lake views
featured_rooms.room3_desc: Commanding lake views with a private terrace

footer.bio: A refuge at the edge of the world. On the shores of Lake Khuvsgul.
footer.address: Mergen's Ridge, eastern Lake Khuvsgul shore, Khuvsgul Province, Mongolia

cta.title: Ready to Experience the Blue Pearl?
cta.subtitle: Book your unforgettable stay at Dalai Eej Heritage Site

address.title: Address
address.visitCopy: Find us on the eastern shore of Lake Khuvsgul, where larch forests meet the Blue Pearl. The road is part of the heritage.
address.bestPrice: You'll always get the best price and full availability by booking directly with us.
address.fullAddress: Mergen's Ridge, Haichin Am, eastern shore of Lake Khuvsgul (13 km from Khatgal), Khuvsgul Province, Mongolia

map.title: Explore the Peninsula
map.subtitle: Now picture yourself here. Walk the grounds that guests return to year after year.
map.hint: Tap a number on the map or the legend below to learn more about each area

reception.title: Reception & Restaurant
reception.desc: The main lodge featuring our lakefront dining hall and lounge bar.

annex.title: The Lodge Annex
annex.desc: Separate building housing the Lodge Rooms, adjacent to the restaurant.

ensuite.title: Ensuite Cabins (Quiet Zone)
ensuite.desc: Private cabins featuring indoor facilities, set back from the shoreline for privacy.

heritage.title: Heritage Cabins (Lakeside Zone)
heritage.desc: Classic, wood-fired cabins positioned centrally along the water's edge.

grand.title: Grand Peninsula Suite
grand.desc: Premier residence commanding the tip of the peninsula.

bathhouse.title: The Bathhouse
bathhouse.desc: Central facility with shared hot showers and restrooms.

sauna.title: Lakeside Sauna
sauna.desc: Private wellness cabin located by the water.

pier.title: The Pier
pier.desc: Main boat landing, transfer point, and kayak launch.

courts.title: Volleyball & Basketball Courts
courts.desc: Sports courts for recreation and morning yoga.

overland.title: To Overland Grounds
overland.desc: Secure camping for tents and vehicles.

offers.title: Heritage Packages
offers.subtitle: Summer 2026 exclusive experiences on the Khuvsgul shoreline

couples.title: Romantic Shoreline Escape
couples.desc: A private cabin for two, secluded from the crowd with uninterrupted views of the lake.

erdenet.title: Erdenet 50th Celebration Special
erdenet.desc: Celebrating half a century of the Copper City! A special thank you to the residents and builders of Erdenet.
erdenet.offer: Exclusive 20% Discount for Erdenet Residents (ID Required)

pioneer.title: Nostalgia Returns
pioneer.desc: Did you spend your childhood summers at a Khuvsgul pioneer camp? Relive the memories at our heritage site.

early.title: Summer 2026 Early Bird
early.desc: Secure your favorite heritage cabin before the seasonal rush.

longstay.title: The Long Weekend & Beyond
longstay.desc: Khuvsgul is too big to see in a day. Take your time to explore the mountains and the water.

family.title: The Big Family Reunion
family.desc: Traveling with extended family? Book neighboring cabins to keep the legacy alive together.

tourOperators.label: Industry Partners
tourOperators.title: For Tour Operators & Agencies
tourOperators.desc: Looking to partner with us? We invite eligible operators to experience our heritage firsthand.

hero.title: Partner Familiarization (FAM) Tour
hero.subtitle: Experience the legacy of Dalai Eej firsthand and discover why our guests return year after year.

complimentary.title: 100% Complimentary Stay
complimentary.desc: Eligible tour operators receive a fully complimentary stay to experience our heritage site.

verification.title: Subject to Verification
verification.desc: All applications are reviewed to verify legitimate tour operator status.

blackout.title: Blackout Dates Apply
blackout.desc: This offer is not valid during peak events, specifically the Naadam Festival period.

rooms.title: Our Heritage Stays
rooms.subtitle: Choose from our selection of wood-fired cabins and suites

grandSuite.title: Grand Peninsula Suite
grandSuite.subtitle: The resort's premier residence
grandSuite.description: Designed for those seeking a shared sanctuary, this suite offers our most commanding vantage point. Panoramic windows frame the lake, ensuring the heritage of the Blue Pearl is always in view.
features: Access to shared hot showers nearby

familyCabin.title: Family Ensuite Cabin
familyCabin.subtitle: Generous space for groups
familyCabin.description: A generous cabin designed for groups. Offers the convenience of private facilities with a secluded veranda overlooking the larch forests.
features: Choice of wood stove or electric heating
Access to shared hot showers nearby

comfortCabin.title: Comfort Ensuite Cabin
comfortCabin.subtitle: Rustic charm with modern privacy
comfortCabin.description: A secluded retreat balancing rustic charm with essential privacy. Perfect for couples or small families who value their own space.
features: Choice of wood stove or electric heating
Access to shared hot showers nearby

standardCabin.title: Standard Lakeside Cabin
standardCabin.subtitle: Our heritage experience
standardCabin.description: Ideally positioned in the heart of the resort, these authentic wood-fired cabins offer a classic Khuvsgul stay. Located on level ground just steps from the dining lodge.
features: Access to shared toilets and hot showers

lodgeRoom.title: The Lodge Room
lodgeRoom.subtitle: Accessible and carefree
lodgeRoom.description: Situated within the main lodge, these rooms offer a temperate, maintenance-free refuge without the need for a wood stove. Ideal for those prioritizing convenience.
features: Access to shared toilets and hot showers

camping.title: Peninsula Camping
camping.subtitle: Secure private grounds
camping.bedding: Dedicated sites for Tents or Vehicles
camping.description: Pitch your tent or park your vehicle on our manicured shoreline grounds. Enjoy the resort lifestyle while sleeping under the stars.
features: Unlimited access to hot showers & fresh water
Full access to restaurant and bar

dining.breakfast: Daily breakfast is included in your room rate.
dining.lunchDinner: Available at our lakefront restaurant. Choose from our Chef's Daily Special or A La Carte selection.
